offer: For property managers processing 5–15 lease payments/month, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We provide timely alerts instead of manual tracking of payment schedules.
problem: Late rent payments leading to cash flow issues.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Participate in forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try alert notifications for due payments on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
